name: Button
description: Primary action trigger with multiple tones and sizes.

disabled.description: Disables interaction and applies disabled styling.

a11yNotes: Set descriptive text content.
Avoid icon-only buttons unless aria-label is provided.
aiHints: Use for primary and secondary actions.
Prefer `variant=secondary` for non-destructive secondary actions.
usageExamples:
import { Button } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Button variant='primary'>Save</Button>

name: Input
description: Text input field for forms and filters.
a11yNotes: Use with `<label>` or `aria-label`.
Describe validation states with helper or error text.
aiHints: Wrap in FormField when label/hint/error text is needed.
usageExamples:
import { Input } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Input placeholder='Email address' />

name: IconButton
description: Compact icon-only button for toolbars and contextual actions.
a11yNotes: Always provide a meaningful `label` for screen readers.
Use danger tone only for destructive actions.
aiHints: Use in dense nav bars, command rows, and table action columns.

name: Textarea
description: Multiline text input for long-form content and notes.

onChange.description: Callback fired for on change events.

a11yNotes: Pair with an explicit label or `aria-label`.
Show helper text for character limits when applicable.
aiHints: Use for feedback forms, release notes, and message composers.
usageExamples:
import { Textarea } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Textarea rows={5} placeholder='Add details' />

name: Select
description: Native select control wrapped with Zephyr tokens and spacing.

onChange.description: Callback fired for on change events.

children.description: Nested content rendered inside the component.

a11yNotes: Use a visible label and descriptive option text.
Avoid using select for very long lists without search.
aiHints: Use in filters, settings, and configuration forms.
usageExamples:
import { Select } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Select><option>Studio</option><option>Editorial</option></Select>

name: Checkbox
description: Binary form control for multi-select preferences.

onChange.description: Callback fired for on change events.

a11yNotes: Wrap with label text for accessible interaction.
Group related checkboxes in a fieldset when possible.
aiHints: Use for settings toggles that can be independently selected.
usageExamples:
import { Checkbox } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<label><Checkbox /> Enable notifications</label>

name: Radio
description: Single-choice selector inside mutually exclusive option groups.

onChange.description: Callback fired for on change events.

a11yNotes: Share the same `name` value within each radio group.
Use fieldset and legend for grouped context.
aiHints: Use for plan/theme choices where only one option is allowed.
usageExamples:
import { Radio } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<label><Radio name='theme' /> Studio</label>

name: Switch
description: Accessible toggle switch for immediate on/off states.

onChange.description: Callback fired for on change events.

a11yNotes: Renders `role=switch` with keyboard support for Enter and Space.
Use concise labels describing current behavior.
aiHints: Use for feature flags and preference toggles.
usageExamples:
import { Switch } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Switch checked={enabled} onChange={setEnabled} label='Enable beta' />

name: Badge
description: Small status label for metadata, state, and tags.

children.description: Nested content rendered inside the component.

a11yNotes: Do not rely only on badge color to communicate meaning.
Include readable text in every badge.
aiHints: Use for item status, release labels, and category chips.
usageExamples:
import { Badge } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Badge tone='success'>Synced</Badge>

name: Avatar
description: User identity image with deterministic text fallback.
a11yNotes: Pass a human-readable `name` for the image alt/aria label.
Keep avatar size large enough for recognition in dense UI.
aiHints: Use in nav headers, comments, tables, and collaboration views.
usageExamples:
import { Avatar } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Avatar name='Akhil Krishnan' />

name: Logo
description: Brand logo image with initials fallback and tokenized shape.
a11yNotes: Set `name` to provide meaningful logo alt text.
Use compliance-approved sources when rendering third-party logos.
aiHints: Use in ecosystem cards, integration lists, and partner sections.
usageExamples:
import { Logo } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Logo name='OpenAI' src={logoDataUri} />

name: FormField
description: Label, control, hint, and error wrapper for form inputs.
a11yNotes: Links label and control using `htmlFor`/`id` pairing.
Expose validation errors in readable text below the control.
aiHints: Use for every labeled form input block in onboarding and settings.
usageExamples:
import { FormField, Input } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<FormField label='Email' htmlFor='email'><Input id='email' /></FormField>

name: SearchBox
description: Input + submit action for query workflows.

onValueChange.description: Callback fired for on value change events.

onSearch.description: Callback fired for on search events.

a11yNotes: Includes form semantics for Enter-to-search keyboard flow.
aiHints: Use near table/list headers to drive filtering.
usageExamples:
import { SearchBox } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<SearchBox value={query} onValueChange={setQuery} onSearch={runSearch} />

name: Tabs
description: Segmented content switcher with accessible tab semantics.

initialTabId.description: Text value for initial tab id.

a11yNotes: Uses `tablist`, `tab`, and `tabpanel` semantics.
aiHints: Use for compact section switching in settings and dashboards.
usageExamples:
import { Tabs } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Tabs items={[{ id: 'overview', label: 'Overview', content: <div /> }]} />

name: Accordion
description: Collapsible content sections for FAQs, settings, and guided documentation.

items.description: Accordion item list with id/title/content metadata.

emptyState.description: Custom content displayed when the items array is empty.

a11yNotes: Uses button semantics with `aria-expanded` and `aria-controls`.
Each open panel is announced via a labeled region.
aiHints: Use for FAQ sections and progressive reveal flows.
Prefer concise titles and short supporting descriptions.
usageExamples:
import { Accordion } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Accordion items={[{ id: 'q1', title: 'What is Zephyr?', description: 'A plug-and-play UI framework.' }]} />

name: Alert
description: Inline feedback banner with status, action link, and dismiss control.
a11yNotes: Rendered with `role=status` for assistive technologies.
Do not rely only on color to communicate message meaning.
aiHints: Use for system feedback and policy notices.
Use stroke style in dense layouts to reduce visual weight.
usageExamples:
import { Alert } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Alert status='error' variant='filled' title='Something went wrong' actionLabel='Retry' />

name: Toast
description: Transient status surface optimized for notifications and AI action feedback.

actionLabel.description: Optional CTA rendered on the right.

onClose.description: Callback fired for on close events.

a11yNotes: When multiple toasts are shown, keep order predictable and manageable.
Use concise text so announcements are quickly understood.
aiHints: Use for async completion, copy confirmations, and background sync notices.
usageExamples:
import { Toast } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Toast open status='success' title='Prompt copied' onClose={() => {}} />

name: Breadcrumbs
description: Hierarchical navigation trail for deep pages.
a11yNotes: Rendered inside a nav landmark with `aria-label='Breadcrumb'.
aiHints: Use on docs and admin pages above the main title.
usageExamples:
import { Breadcrumbs } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Breadcrumbs items={[{ id: 'home', label: 'Home', href: '/' }]} />

name: Pagination
description: Previous/next navigation with page count context.

onPageChange.description: Callback fired for on page change events.

a11yNotes: Buttons expose disabled state for first/last boundaries.
aiHints: Use below tables and result lists.
usageExamples:
import { Pagination } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Pagination page={page} totalPages={10} onPageChange={setPage} />

name: CommandBar
description: Inline command launcher with query input and action buttons.

onQueryChange.description: Callback fired for on query change events.

a11yNotes: Uses form semantics for Enter-to-run on primary action.
aiHints: Use in command palettes and quick actions headers.
usageExamples:
import { CommandBar } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<CommandBar query={query} onQueryChange={setQuery} actions={actions} />

name: InputGroup
description: Input field with optional leading/trailing adornments.
a11yNotes: Pair with labels or aria-label for form accessibility.
aiHints: Use for currency, search, and prefixed text fields.
usageExamples:
import { InputGroup } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<InputGroup startAdornment='$' placeholder='Budget' />

name: Dropdown
description: Compact disclosure menu using native details/summary.
a11yNotes: Menu entries are focusable buttons for keyboard support.
aiHints: Use for overflow actions and contextual menus.
usageExamples:
import { Dropdown } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Dropdown label='Actions' items={[{ id: 'edit', label: 'Edit', onSelect: () => {} }]} />

name: Navbar
description: Top-level navigation with brand, links, and action slot.
a11yNotes: Use inside `<nav>` for semantic navigation landmarks.
aiHints: Use as top-level layout shell in admin and SaaS products.
usageExamples: import { Navbar } from '@zephyr/ui-react'; Zephyr} links={[{ id: 'home', label: 'Home', href: '/' }]} />

name: Header
description: Section header with title, subtitle, and actions slot.
a11yNotes: Prefer one primary heading per section hierarchy.
Keep action labels explicit when multiple controls are present.
aiHints: Use above card/table sections to establish context and actions.
usageExamples:
import { Header, Button } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Header title='Workspace' subtitle='Manage your project' actions={<Button>New</Button>} />

name: DataTable
description: Typed data table with custom rendering per column.
a11yNotes: Use `<th>` headers and keep row actions keyboard accessible.
aiHints: Pair with SearchBox and FiltersBar for interactive data screens.
usageExamples:
import { DataTable } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<DataTable data={rows} columns={columns} rowKey={(row) => row.id} />

name: ModalDialog
description: Confirmation and workflow modal with controlled open state.

onCancel.description: Callback fired for on cancel events.

onConfirm.description: Callback fired for on confirm events.

a11yNotes: Uses dialog semantics and backdrop click-to-close.
Ensure focus management in host application if nested flows are used.
aiHints: Use for destructive confirmations and short multi-step flows.
usageExamples:
import { ModalDialog } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<ModalDialog open={open} title='Delete item' onCancel={close} onConfirm={remove} />

name: SidebarNav
description: Sectioned vertical navigation for docs/admin layouts.

sections.type: Array<{ id, title, items: Array<{ id, label, href, active? }> }>

a11yNotes: Use within an aside landmark and ensure clear active indication.
aiHints: Use for persistent left navigation in documentation and apps.
usageExamples:
import { SidebarNav } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<SidebarNav sections={sections} />

name: FiltersBar
description: Horizontal filter controls row with optional reset action.

onReset.description: Callback fired for on reset events.

a11yNotes: Filter controls should expose labels and keyboard interaction.
aiHints: Pair with DataTable and SearchBox on data screens.
usageExamples:
import { FiltersBar } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<FiltersBar items={filters} onReset={resetFilters} />

name: SearchResultsPanel
description: Query summary with selectable search result list.

results.type: Array<{ id, title, description?, metadata?, onSelect? }>

a11yNotes: Each result row is rendered as an interactive button.
aiHints: Use in command/search experiences and discovery pages.
usageExamples:
import { SearchResultsPanel } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<SearchResultsPanel query={query} results={results} />

name: LayoutShell
description: Page scaffold with top nav, sidebar, content area, and optional right rail.

children.description: Nested content rendered inside the component.

a11yNotes: Use semantic landmarks (`nav`, `aside`, `main`) for better screen reader navigation.
aiHints: Use as a starting point for docs portals and admin dashboards.
usageExamples:
import { LayoutShell, Navbar } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<LayoutShell topNav={<Navbar brand='Zephyr' links={[]} />}>...</LayoutShell>

name: IconLibrary
description: Searchable Material icon browser with style variants and copy-on-click behavior.

initialQuery.description: Initial search query for icon discovery.

onCopy.description: Callback fired for on copy events.

a11yNotes: Keep icon cards keyboard focusable and expose icon names in readable text.
Use explicit labels for icon-only UI controls after insertion.
aiHints: Use for icon pickers, command palettes, and design handoff tooling.
Support semantic search terms (e.g., settings, billing, support).
usageExamples:
import { IconLibrary } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<IconLibrary initialQuery='settings' onCopy={(name) => console.log(name)} />

name: AvatarLibrary
description: Searchable in-house avatar style browser with deterministic style previews.

sampleName.description: Display name used to render avatar previews.

onCopy.description: Callback fired for on copy events.

a11yNotes: Display style names as text labels so previews are understandable without color.
Ensure copied style ids are announced with toast or status text.
aiHints: Use for profile setup flows and collaborative presence pickers.
Expose style + seed controls for deterministic generation.
usageExamples:
import { AvatarLibrary } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<AvatarLibrary initialQuery='retro' onCopy={(style) => console.log(style)} />

name: LogoLibrary
description: Searchable first-party brand logo browser with domain copy workflow.

onCopy.description: Callback fired for on copy events.

a11yNotes: Show brand name and domain text next to each logo tile.
Do not rely on color alone to distinguish brands.
aiHints: Use in integration galleries, partner lists, and asset pickers.
Allow searching by brand name, domain, and category tags.
usageExamples:
import { LogoLibrary } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<LogoLibrary initialQuery='developer' onCopy={(domain) => console.log(domain)} />

name: Stack
description: Flexbox layout primitive for vertical and horizontal stacking with token-based gap.
a11yNotes: Pure layout — no semantic role. Use appropriate landmarks on children.
aiHints: Use for arranging groups of elements with consistent spacing.
Prefer Stack over manual flexbox styles.
usageExamples:
import { Stack, Button } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Stack direction='row' gap={3}><Button>Cancel</Button><Button variant='primary'>Save</Button></Stack>

name: Grid
description: CSS Grid layout primitive with token-based columns and gap.
a11yNotes: Pure layout — no semantic role. Use appropriate landmarks on children.
aiHints: Use for card grids, feature sections, and dashboard stat rows.
Prefer Grid over manual CSS grid styles.
usageExamples:
import { Grid, Box } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Grid columns={3} gap={4}><Box>Card 1</Box><Box>Card 2</Box><Box>Card 3</Box></Grid>

name: Box
description: Generic container with token-based padding, margin, radius, and background.
a11yNotes: Pure layout — no semantic role. Use appropriate landmarks on children.
aiHints: Use as a card container, section wrapper, or styled panel.
Prefer Box over manual div + inline style.
usageExamples:
import { Box } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Box padding={4} radius='md' border>Content here</Box>

name: Spacer
description: Invisible spacing element for inserting vertical or horizontal gaps.
a11yNotes: Decorative only — hidden from assistive technologies.
aiHints: Use between sections when Stack gap is insufficient.
Prefer Stack with gap over multiple Spacer elements.
usageExamples:
import { Spacer } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Spacer size={6} />

name: DashboardPage
description: Full dashboard layout with stat cards, data table, and activity feed sidebar.

onNewItem.description: Callback fired for on new item events.

a11yNotes: Use heading hierarchy for stat labels and table headers.
Ensure stat change indicators include text, not just color.
aiHints: Use as a starting point for admin dashboards and project overview pages.
Compose with DataTable, Badge, Avatar, Grid, Stack, and Box.
usageExamples:
import { DashboardPage } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<DashboardPage title='Analytics' onNewItem={() => {}} />

name: AuthPage
description: Sign-in / sign-up page with email form, OAuth providers, and mode switching.

onSubmit.description: Callback fired for on submit events.

onModeSwitch.description: Callback fired for on mode switch events.

a11yNotes: Use form landmarks and associate labels with inputs.
Announce validation errors to screen readers.
aiHints: Use for login and registration flows.
Compose with FormField, Input, Button, and Stack.
usageExamples:
import { AuthPage } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<AuthPage brand='Zephyr' mode='sign-in' onSubmit={handleAuth} onModeSwitch={toggleMode} />

name: SettingsPage
description: Application settings page with grouped form sections and save action.

onSave.description: Callback fired for on save events.

a11yNotes: Group related settings in fieldsets with legends.
Announce save confirmation via status toast.
aiHints: Use for account, profile, and application configuration pages.
Compose with FormField, Input, Switch, Select, and Button.
usageExamples:
import { SettingsPage } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<SettingsPage title='Account Settings' onSave={saveSettings} />

name: OnboardingPage
description: Multi-step onboarding wizard with progress indicator and validation.

onComplete.description: Callback fired for on complete events.

a11yNotes: Announce step transitions and progress to screen readers.
Keep step titles concise and descriptive.
aiHints: Use for product setup, profile completion, and guided tours.
Compose with FormField, Input, Button, Stack, and Badge.
usageExamples:
import { OnboardingPage } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<OnboardingPage steps={steps} onComplete={handleComplete} />

name: MarketingPage
description: Landing page template with hero, feature grid, pricing cards, social proof, and CTA.

pricingPlans.type: Array<{ name, price, description, features, cta, highlighted? }>

onCtaClick.description: Callback fired for on cta click events.

a11yNotes: Use heading hierarchy for hero and section titles.
Ensure pricing comparison is accessible via table semantics or structured list.
aiHints: Use for product landing pages, marketing sites, and launch pages.
Compose with Button, Grid, Stack, Box, Badge, and Logo.
usageExamples:
import { MarketingPage } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<MarketingPage heroTitle='Build faster' heroSubtitle='Ship beautiful products' ctaLabel='Get Started' onCtaClick={() => {}} />

name: Card
description: Surface container with configurable shadow, padding, and border. Supports clickable variant and CardHeader/CardFooter sub-components.

onClick.description: Makes the card a clickable button.

a11yNotes: When using onClick, a focusable button element is rendered instead of a div.
aiHints: Use as the primary surface container for dashboard panels, list items, and settings sections.
Compose with CardHeader and CardFooter for structured content areas.
usageExamples:
import { Card, CardHeader, CardFooter } from '@zephyr/ui-react';

Card title

 Content here

name: Divider
description: Horizontal or vertical separator rule with optional label. Uses role=separator.
a11yNotes: Uses role=separator. Vertical dividers work best inside flex rows.
aiHints: Use between sections, list groups, and sidebar menu items.
usageExamples:
import { Divider } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Divider />
<Divider label='or' />
<Divider orientation='vertical' />

name: Progress
description: Determinate or indeterminate progress bar with accessible role=progressbar semantics.
a11yNotes: Uses aria-valuenow/aria-valuemin/aria-valuemax when determinate.
Indeterminate state uses aria-label without value attributes.
aiHints: Use for file uploads, step completion, and onboarding flows.
Pair with label text above the bar for context.

name: Skeleton
description: Shimmer placeholder block shown while content is loading. Supports single blocks and multi-line text patterns.
a11yNotes: Uses aria-busy=true. Wrap loading areas in a live region for screen reader announcements.
aiHints: Use inside Card or list items as loading placeholders.
Use lines={3} for paragraph text placeholders.
usageExamples:
import { Skeleton } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Skeleton height={20} width='60%' />
<Skeleton lines={3} />
<Skeleton width={48} height={48} radius='full' />

name: Slider
description: Draggable range input with keyboard navigation, value bubble, and min/max labels.
a11yNotes: Uses role=slider with aria-valuenow/min/max.
Full keyboard support: arrows, Home, End.
aiHints: Use for volume, opacity, price range, and settings controls.
usageExamples:
import { Slider } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Slider value={volume} min={0} max={100} onChange={setVolume} showValue />

name: Tooltip
description: Floating label shown on hover or focus. Supports four placement sides and configurable delay.
a11yNotes: Uses aria-describedby to link the tooltip to its trigger.
Tooltip is hidden from screen readers when not visible.
aiHints: Wrap any interactive element to add a descriptive label.
Prefer short text (< 10 words) in tooltip content.
usageExamples:
import { Tooltip } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<Tooltip content='Save your changes' side='top'>
  <Button variant='ghost'>Save</Button>
</Tooltip>

name: Popover
description: Click-triggered floating panel for menus, pickers, and inline forms. Supported controlled and uncontrolled modes.

trigger.description: The element that opens the popover.

a11yNotes: Uses role=dialog. Close on Escape and outside click.
aiHints: Use for date pickers, color pickers, filter panels, and inline form flows.
usageExamples:
import { Popover, Button } from '@zephyr/ui-react'; Options}>

Popover content here

name: ComboBox
description: Searchable select with keyboard navigation, async loading state, and optional custom value entry.

options.description: Array of { value, label, disabled?, description? } items.

loading.description: Shows loading state for async options.

allowCustomValue.description: Allow typing values not in the list.

a11yNotes: Uses role=combobox with aria-expanded, aria-controls, and aria-activedescendant.
Full keyboard support: arrows, Enter, Escape.
aiHints: Use instead of Select when the options list is long or searchable.
For async search, update options and set loading=true while fetching.

name: NumberInput
description: Numeric input with ± stepper buttons, min/max clamping, and optional locale formatting.
a11yNotes: Decrease/increase buttons have aria-label. Arrow key shortcuts work on the input.
aiHints: Use for quantity fields, page sizes, and numeric config inputs.
usageExamples:
import { NumberInput } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<NumberInput value={qty} min={1} max={99} onChange={setQty} />

name: TagInput
description: Multi-value chip input. Enter or comma adds a tag; Backspace removes the last. Supports controlled mode and custom validation.

validate.description: Return false to reject a tag.

a11yNotes: Each tag has an aria-label remove button.
Focus moves into the input area naturally with keyboard.
aiHints: Use for email recipients, label/category assignment, and filter chip inputs.
usageExamples:
import { TagInput } from '@zephyr/ui-react';
<TagInput value={tags} onChange={setTags} placeholder='Add label…' maxTags={10} />

name: Sheet
description: Slide-in drawer from left, right, or bottom. Portal-rendered with overlay, ESC close, and body scroll lock.

onClose.description: Called when the sheet should close.

side.description: Edge the sheet slides in from.

size.description: Width (left/right) or height (bottom) of the panel.

a11yNotes: Uses role=dialog aria-modal=true. ESC key closes.
Body scroll is locked while the sheet is open.
aiHints: Use for detail panels, cart sidebars, notification trays, and mobile nav drawers.
usageExamples:
import { Sheet } from '@zephyr/ui-react'; setOpen(false)} title='Details' side='right'>

Sheet content

name: AlertDialog
description: Confirm/cancel modal with primary or danger action tone. Focus-managed with ESC close and body scroll lock.

onClose.description: Called on cancel or outside click.

a11yNotes: Uses role=alertdialog aria-modal=true.
aria-labelledby and aria-describedby are wired to title and description.
aiHints: Use for destructive actions like delete, revoke, or archive.
Set confirmTone='danger' for irreversible actions.
